positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of various flora (ferns, stylized trees, wildflowers) arranged in a harmonious, cyclical pattern. The composition should be centralized and symmetrical, creating a continuous, repeating border motif ideal for apparel printing. Style: High-contrast linework, clean vector illustration, inspired by Art Deco and Japandi aesthetics. Color direction: Limited two-tone palette (deep emerald green and off-white) on a solid background. Detail: Focus on sharp edges, clean negative space, and strong, bold outlines. Crisp, graphic design feel, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, word, gradient, photorealism, noisy, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty edges
